allowed_release_candidate_claim: A public-data, development-only benchmark found no tested QML candidate that outperformed strong classical controls or qualified for a QML Gate 6 mission experiment.
claim_boundary: D031-C completes claim/release review preparation only; it authorizes no release, tag, archive, DOI, Gate 6 run, locked-data access, mission-loop execution, model fitting, QML invention claim, or quantum-advantage claim.
next_human_decision: Accept release package, request revisions, or reject release.
